description: Initial scoring component weights for composite score computation. Loaded into scoring_weights DB table at first run. Weights must sum to 1.0.

weights.description: Poster credibility from investor_profiles.credibility_score (manual seed, auto-updated)
Conviction level from Claude scoring (PostScore.conviction_level normalized to [0,1])
Argument quality from Claude scoring (HIGH=1.0, MEDIUM=0.6, LOW=0.2)
Post engagement normalized by rolling max: (view_count + 5*repost_count) / max_observed_30d
Investor rolling 30-day directional accuracy from investor_profiles.rolling_accuracy_30d
